Mr. '''Greybird''' was one of the security personnel aboard the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Liberator (Imperial I-class)|''Liberator'']] when it was downed over [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. [[General/Legends|General]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] assigned Greybird and another escort, [[Demolinn]], to accompany [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Journalist/Legends|journalist]] [[Rivoche Tarkin]] while she explored the ruins of [[Galactic City/Legends|Imperial City]] and searched for survivors of the [[Imperial Coalition|Imperial]] [[Second Battle of Coruscant|reconquest]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]].<ref name="EA" />

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Eyewitness to Apocalypse|book=Dark Empire Sourcebook}} {{Mo}}
